data.raceName: KATE DEANE MEMORIAL QTIS MAIDEN PLATE
data.raceComments: {"comment":"The big maiden and hinges on some first starters to the area. 8. CLIODHNA MAEVE is a former south-east Qld galloper having its first start for the new yard. Comes off a fourth on the Sunny Coast latest. Has good figures for this level and expected to go close. Same goes for 4. ZOUSTRONG who is a former NSW galloper also making debut for a new barn. Has ability and should run well. 1. DAY TO REMEMBER resumes from a long break. Placed 2/2 fresh and expected to make a bright return. 9. FORTUNAS GIRL is another having first run for new yard and has claims despite the wide draw. 3. TAKE A BREAK is yet another former NSW galloper with a new team and is worth including fresh.","runners":[8,4,1,9,3],"exclusive":false}
